concept: Side-scrolling, stage-select run-and-gun with tight jump arcs, knockback on hit, and high-penalty hazards (pits/spikes). Defeat any of six Robot Masters in any order; each grants a unique weapon with limited energy that enables new tactics and solves specific boss/obstacle checks. Core loop revolves around pattern reading, damage racing, and weakness routing (choosing the next boss based on weapon effectiveness). Utility is minimal but decisive: the Magnet Beam creates temporary platforms to bridge gaps and access secrets. No slide/charge shot, no Energy Tanks; resource management hinges on weapon drops and sparse refills. Endgame Wily stages emphasize precision on disappearing block (Yoku) sequences and boss gauntlets with limited healing between encounters.
name: Mega Man
